message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
class App {
    <<C>>
    + main()
    + start()
}

class FileHandler {
    <<C>>
    + promptFile(): String
    + writeListToFile(): void
    + readListFromFile(): ArrayList<String>
}

class HomeScreenController {
    <<C>>
    - ObservableList<OL> Lists
    + viewListsClicked()
    + listClicked(nameOfList, mode)
    + addBlankListClicked()
    + addExistingListClicked()
    + editListClicked()
    + saveAllListsClicked()
    + confirmDeleteClicked()
}

class ListScreenController {
    <<C>>
    - ObservableList currentList
    + filterBoxChanged()
    + saveToStorage()
    + addNewItemClicked()
    + deleteSelectedClicked()
    + completeBoxChanged(item)
    + itemDescChanged(item)
    + itemDueDateChanged(item)
    + itemSelected(item)
}

class item {
    <<C>>
    - LocalDate dueDate
    - String desc
    + getDesc()
    + getDate()
    + setDesc()
    + setDate()
}

App -- HomeScreenController
App -- ListScreenController
HomeScreenController o-- FileHandler
ListScreenController o-- FileHandler
ListScreenController o-- item
@enduml
```
